title: Topology Rules
description: Defines PM mode topology constraints for the dark-governance binary.

parallel_coders.description: Number of parallel coders per team lead. -1 for unlimited.

required_personas.description: List of personas required in the topology.

every_techLead_must_have_coders.description: Every TechLead must have at least one Coder child.

every_coder_must_have_parent.description: Every Coder must have a TechLead parent.

devops_required_in_pm_mode.description: DevOps agent is required when PM mode is active.
